mentions.note: Q4: 3% Old Navy, 7% Gap, 4% Banana Republic; 8 consecutive quarters positive comps; highest margin in 25 yrs; beauty expansion, tariff headwinds offset; 10% selloff unjustified.
Stock crashed 50% but Gap brand strong (+10% comp); Old Navy weakness and Athleta missteps explain market reaction; turnaround trajectory unclear; need more digging
Athleta athletic division down 12% in sales, 11% same-store sales. Long turnaround project; market penalizes these. At 9x earnings, no compelling upside without turnaround proof.
